## Summary

Describe the bug clearly.

## Affected File Or Area

## Expected Behavior

What should happen?

## Actual Behavior

What happens instead?

## Suggested Fix

If you have a proposed fix, describe it here.

## Environment

Include OS, Node.js version, tool version, or browser details if relevant.

## Additional Context

Add logs, screenshots, references, or related issues. Do not include private keys, PII, card data, bank data, raw prompts, responses, customer names, private merchant data, or full logs.
